cause: Nsight stop-shutdown terminated the multiprocess target after the first PP rank called cudaProfilerStop and exited 137 before its automatic report import.
recovery: The complete trace.qdstrm stream was imported with the matching Nsight Systems 2025.3.1 QdstrmImporter, then exported to a four-table SQLite containing session, string, CUDA kernel, and CUDA runtime records.
validity: The request gate passed before shutdown: HTTP 200, 16,384 prompt tokens, one completion token, zero cached tokens, and the same response hash as all warmup and measured requests.
